ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frame_data" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the frame was captured */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being tracked */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video file from which the frame is extracted */,
  "left_shoulder" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left shoulder joint */,
  "right_shoulder" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right shoulder joint */,
  "left_elbow" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left elbow joint */,
  "right_elbow" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right elbow joint */,
  "left_hip" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left hip joint */,
  "right_hip" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right hip joint */,
  "left_knee" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left knee joint */,
  "right_knee" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right knee joint */,
  "left_ankle" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left ankle joint */,
  "right_ankle" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right ankle joint */,
  "left_wrist" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left wrist joint */,
  "right_wrist" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right wrist joint */,
  "left_ear" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left ear joint */,
  "right_ear" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right ear joint */,
  "left_eye" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left eye joint */,
  "right_eye" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right eye joint */,
  "nose" REAL /* X-coordinate of the nose joint */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the pose estimation */,
  "estimation_method" TEXT /* Method used for pose estimation (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_data_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the subject */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_name" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video file was uploaded */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the video (e.g., 30 fps, 60 fps) */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used to capture the video */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the video (e.g., MP4, AVI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the camera */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the camera */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the camera is installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera (e.g., RGB, RGB-D, Infrared) */,
  "lens_type" TEXT /* Type of lens used in the camera (e.g., Wide-angle, Telephoto) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the session (e.g., Training, Rehabilitation) */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject participating in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Individual, Group) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Completed, Ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_videos" (
  "session_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-video mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the video was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_videos_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_videos_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame metadata */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number within the video */,
  "frame_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the frame (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the frame in milliseconds */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the frame processing (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if frame processing failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_metadata_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frame_data ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skeletal_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skeletal model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the skeletal model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skeletal model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the skeletal model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the skeletal model file */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of skeletal model (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "num_joints" INTEGER /* Number of joints in the skeletal model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_used" (
  "model_used_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model used in a session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skeletal model */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the model was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_used_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_used_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_used_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES skeletal_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "light_level" REAL /* Light level in lux */,
  "sound_level" REAL /* Sound level in decibels */,
  "air_quality" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Oxygen level in percentage */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure in mmHg (systolic/diastolic) */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate in breaths per minute */,
  "body_temperature" REAL /* Body temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., Pose Estimation, Motion Analysis) */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data in JSON format */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frame_data ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Coach, Therapist, Admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-session mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the session */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Analyze) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Completed, Ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_videos" (
  "user_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-video mapping */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the video */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_videos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_videos_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_frames" (
  "user_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-frame mapping */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the frame */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_frames_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frame_data ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_frames_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subjects" (
  "user_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-subject mapping */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the subject data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subjects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "user_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-model mapping */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skeletal model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the model */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES skeletal_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., Comment, Tag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frame_data ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Insert, Update, Delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the activity */,
  "affected_row" TEXT /* Row affected by the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., Boolean, Integer, String) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
